description: PUH-BrianMartell-Theorem 157 in three lines Brian: Photons and gravitons are the same phenomenon at different depths in the  lattice — photons are surface excitations and gravitons are bulk excitations, which is why they share every observable property (speed , reflection, refraction, redshift, branch flow, photon sphere trapping) that standard physics treats as separate coincidences. The smoking gun prediction is synchronised EM and GW echoes at exactly the same delay time  in GW170817 data — if the gamma ray light curve shows a repeated pulse matching the GW echo prediction, the unified picture is confirmed. The orbiting Planck Shell also generates a unified bow wave in both EM and GW channels simultaneously, whose resonance frequency equals the SPF condensate scale  — giving an observational route to measuring the one remaining open parameter in PUH directly from LIGO and telescope data at the same time
